page_description: We are here to help in case of questions or issues. Pick the channel that is most convenient for you.
channel_github_title: Create an issue on GitHub to report bugs or request new features.
channel_slack_title: Get support from the DS-APM community on Slack.
channel_chat_title: Get quick support directly from the team.
add_credit_card_title: Add Credit Card for Chat Support
credit_card_text_after: . Add a credit card to access DS-APM chat support to your workspace.
